title: 12 Pcs Spiral Hair Ties, MultiColor Hair Elastic Bands, No Crease Phone Cord Hair Bobbles, Plastic Hair Coil Bands, Spiral Ponytail Holder Hair Bands for Women Girls
features: 【Durable Material】Hair ties are made of premium quality plastic material which is no smell, nontoxic and eco-friendly. The smooth surfaces of the coil hair bobbles provide a soft and comfortable hand feeling
【Unique Design】The unique spiral hair ties applies uneven pressure around the ponytail Less headache, less pulling and damage to hair than other hair ties
【Reusable】If your hair elastic bands is deformed by stretching, simply place it in a cup of hot water or use a hot air dryer to restore it to its original shape
【Waterproof】These Spiral Hair bands are waterproof and sweat-proof design are perfect for swimming, bathing, play at the beach or Women and girls who love sports and fitness

【Widely Use】The hair ties can keep your hair tightly and stay a ponytail whole day, and can be worn on your hands like a bracelet when not in use. Spiral hair band can help girls or women create different hairstyles, whether it is straight, curly, thin or thick hair
description: Product Description Features 1. Come in 12 pcs Spiral Hair Bands in 3 assorted beautiful colors(transparent, light coffee and black) which match your different color hair. 2. The coil hair ties for women is 3,8cm in diameter, very light and portable. 3. Spiral Hair Ties can hold your hair tightly while working, sporting or playing via the good elastic. 4.Waterproof material makes spiral hair bands perfect for swimming and bathing.They can be applied in various occasions such as school, home, office or using them when you are working out. 5.The smooth surface of the non-marking hair bands can easily remove it from the hair. Freedom to use without any snags or pulls to your hair. Specifications Color： transparent, light coffee and black Product Size： inner diameter : Appr 2 cm/0.8 inches, outer diameter : Appr 3.8 cm/1.5 inches Package includes:12 x Spiral Hair Ties
